title: AI's Impact on Future Work

modules.title: Jobs AI Will Transform
modules.sub: Mapping automation, augmentation, and creation across industries
modules.description: Learners analyze which roles across major industries are most vulnerable to automation, which will be augmented by AI tools, and which entirely new jobs are emerging. They apply a transformation framework to real occupations, categorizing them and drawing conclusions about workforce shifts over the coming decades.

modules.title: Skills for AI Era
modules.sub: Identifying the human capabilities AI cannot replace
modules.description: Learners evaluate the skills—technical, cognitive, and interpersonal—that will hold the most value as AI handles routine tasks. They conduct a personal skills audit to identify gaps and prioritize which capabilities to develop to remain competitive in an AI-enhanced job market.

modules.title: Human AI Collaboration Strategies
modules.sub: Designing effective workflows where humans and AI partner
modules.description: Learners explore practical models for dividing work between human judgment and AI capability, examining real-world case studies across different professional contexts. They design a collaboration framework suited to their own role, deciding how to delegate tasks to AI while retaining meaningful human oversight and creativity.

modules.title: Preparing for Career Changes
modules.sub: Building an adaptive career plan for an uncertain AI future
modules.description: Learners assess their current career trajectory against projected AI-driven disruption timelines and identify pivot points where proactive action is needed. They construct a personalized career adaptation plan that includes upskilling priorities, professional network strategies, and contingency paths for multiple possible futures.

synopsis: Discover which jobs AI will automate, augment, or create in the coming decades across different industries. Learn essential skills and strategies to thrive in an AI-enhanced workplace and adapt your career for the future.
